title: Discord Whitelist
description: A seamless integration between Discord and Minecraft that allows you to manage your server's whitelist directly through Discord bot commands or HTTP API calls.
body:
A seamless integration between Discord and Minecraft that allows you to manage your server's whitelist directly through Discord bot commands or HTTP API calls.

Key Features:
🔹 Easy Setup - Connect your Discord bot in minutes
🔹 Secure - Token-based authentication
🔹 Multilingual - Supports English and Russian
🔹 No Lag - Asynchronous processing
🔹 Powerful API - Add/remove players via REST endpoints

Perfect for:
✔ Server owners who want Discord-based whitelisting
✔ Communities with application systems
✔ Developers needing whitelist API access

Requirements:

- Spigot/Paper 1.21+
- Java 17+
